name: Backup & Restore Config
description: Export full configuration via ClawDeckX for cross-device migration or disaster recovery

content.body:
Regularly backing up your OpenClaw configuration prevents accidental loss and makes it easy to migrate between devices. ClawDeckX provides visual export/import functionality.

**Backup Includes:**
- Complete openclaw.json configuration file (providers, models, channels, sessions and all settings)
- Agent files (IDENTITY.md, SOUL.md, USER.md, MEMORY.md)
- Cron jobs and webhook configuration

**Not Included:**
- API Keys (for security, must be re-entered on new devices)
- Historical session data (stored in local database)
- Installed skills and plugins (need reinstallation)

steps.title: Export Configuration
steps.description: Go to Config Center → JSON Editor → Click the "Export" button in the toolbar. The system will download the complete current configuration as a JSON file. You can also directly copy all content from the JSON Editor.

steps.title: Backup Agent Files
steps.description: Go to Config Center → Agents → Click each agent's file list and copy the content of IDENTITY.md, SOUL.md, etc. one by one. Or directly backup all files in the ~/.openclaw/agents/ directory.

steps.title: Restore on New Device
steps.description: Install OpenClaw and ClawDeckX on the new device → Go to Config Center → JSON Editor → Paste the backed-up JSON configuration → Save.

steps.title: Fill in Sensitive Information
steps.description: After restoring, re-enter all API Keys: Go to Config Center → Models and re-enter API Keys for each provider. Also check if channel tokens need updating.

steps.title: Verify Restoration
steps.description: Run Health Center diagnostics to confirm all configuration items are normal. Red errors usually mean API Keys or tokens haven't been re-entered.
